info.title: Book Store API
info.description: ## Book Store API A full-featured digital bookstore backend built with Laravel, following Clean Architecture and Domain-Driven Design principles. ### Authentication Most endpoints require a **Bearer token** issued by Sanctum after login. - Reader endpoints: `POST /auth/login` or `POST /auth/register` - Admin endpoints: `POST /admin/auth/login` Include the token in every protected request: ``` Authorization: Bearer <token> ``` ### Access Control | Role | Scope | |--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------| | Guest | Browse books, search, view tags | | Reader | Reading list, progress tracking, sessions, cart, notifications | | Admin | Book management (create/update/delete/publish), file & cover upload | ### Pagination Paginated responses follow a consistent envelope: ```json { "data": [...], "meta": { "total": 100, "per_page": 20, "current_page": 1, "total_pages": 5 } } ``` ### Money Prices are stored and returned as **integer cents** (e.g. `1990` = €19.90). A `formatted` field is always included for display convenience. ### Error Codes | HTTP | Meaning | |------|--------------------------------------------| | 401 | Unauthenticated | | 403 | Forbidden (wrong role or no book access) | | 404 | Resource not found | | 409 | Conflict (duplicate entry) | | 422 | Validation error |

tags.name: Books
tags.description: Book catalog — browsing, searching, publishing, cover & file management.

tags.name: Reader Auth
tags.description: Registration, login and logout for readers.

tags.name: Reading List
tags.description: Per-user reading list: want_to_read → reading → finished / dropped.

tags.name: Progress
tags.description: Granular page-level reading progress with Redis-cached scroll positions.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Reading sessions tracking time spent and pages read per sitting.

tags.name: History
tags.description: Aggregated reading history across all sessions.

tags.name: Pages
tags.description: Book page content with adjacent-page navigation and inline progress.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: In-app notifications (book published, purchase receipt, reading finished).

tags.name: Cart
tags.description: Shopping cart supporting books and subscription plan items.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Stripe webhook receiver — grants book access and activates subscriptions.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: q — поисковый запрос. nullable: пустой запрос = "показать всё" (MeiliSearch с пустой строкой возвращает все документы)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Фильтры — все опциональны, валидируем через Rule::enum

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Пагинация — limit/offset, а не page/per_page, потому что MeiliSearch работает именно с offset-based пагинацией

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
